title: nf-core/multitme pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

scrna.errorMessage: Path to scRNA-seq h5ad file must be provided

xenium.errorMessage: Path to Xenium data must be provided (h5ad file, SpatialData zarr directory, or Xenium Ranger output directory)
